Query Text: What is the admission process for engineering courses?
Response Text: The admission process includes application form submission, entrance exam, and counseling.

Query Text: What courses are available in computer science department?
Response Text: We offer B.Tech, M.Tech, and PhD programs in Computer Science.

Query Text: How can I contact the admission office?
Response Text: You can contact the admission office at admin@college.edu or call 123-456-7890.

Query Text: What facilities are available in the campus library?
Response Text: The library has study rooms, computer labs, and a large collection of books.

Query Text: Who is the head of the computer science department?
Response Text: Dr. Smith is the head of the Computer Science department.
